title: Toggleable PieChart
description: Allows you to toggle the Debug PieChart on/off, and also change it's position and scale. Now with a selection cursor!
body:
## What it does
This mod allows users to toggle the debug piechart's visibility regardless of the F3 debug menu.

This mod also allows the user to customize the piechart's position and scale, along with easier navigation

## How to use

### Toggle the chart
Press the **toggle key-bind** to toggle the piechart

### Customize the chart
Press the **settings key-bind** to configure it.

### Navigate the chart
Use the **navigation keys** to navigate the chart using the selection cursor

_Default **toggle key-bind** is **P**_

_Default **settings key-bind** is **O**_

_Default **navigation keys** are -> **Up/Down (Up/Down), Enter (Select), Backspace (Go back)**_

## Can I see :D
Yes

![Shows the settings menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E458mw0Z/images/6d350e70435bf6396036799560a50060484ed4a8.png)
